name: LoadingOverlay
visual_summary: LoadingOverlay displays a loading animation to inform users that content is being loaded. Typically used when fetching data or processing information in the background. Often used in forms, list views, or detail pages to keep the user interface responsive.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Name: LoadingOverlay
Description: LoadingOverlay displays a loading animation to inform users that content is being loaded. Typically used when fetching data or processing information in the background. Often used in forms, list views, or detail pages to keep the user interface responsive.
Style: light
Interactions: 
Tags: loading, overlay, waiting

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
